paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over the last 20 sessions.

The recent news is driven by the company's governance issues and a recent convertible notes offering. Director designee Miles Everson resigned due to governance concerns, and the company completed a $375 million offering of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K filing on July 13 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
